patch.value: Vision: pm is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI that ships PM primitives via an SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it. Guiding principle: project management = context management. This milestone groups the post-v0.1 capability epics and their open backlog (surfaced by the 2026-05-31 ecosystem audit pm-w7f2). PRD post-v0.1 roadmap items (advanced search tuning, adapter optimization, sandbox API surface) live here as concrete, dedup-checked work.
Forward-looking roadmap milestone anchoring the open, living backlog for pm-cli beyond v0.1. Complements (does not duplicate) the closed PRD delivery milestones.
Deliver a universal, fully-customizable PM tool whose baseline primitives (via the pm SDK) adapt to any project
A discoverable forward backlog turns the tracker from a completed-work log into a living context map for humans and agents
Tracker had 902 items but zero open/forward work; pm context returned empty. This milestone seeds the forward layer.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: 2026-06-07 ecosystem audit (plan pm-8u2a): rebuilt the empty forward backlog — 71 new OPEN items across all 9 capability epics + 2 new ADRs (pm-7sq6 coverage governance, pm-cc04 agent self-repair). Delivered by 5 specialized audit sub-agents (disjoint epic scopes). pm context now returns actionable leaf work again.
